calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Jul-30-2007 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-29-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for trial this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert CSR: TRINA AYALA.
Atty. Jerome M. Yalon Jr. Esq. for Plaintiff: Discover Card
No appearance by Defendant Glenn Carollo.
The cross-complaint in this case is dismissed without prejudice.
EXH.A - Application for Credit -------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. B - Cardmember Agreement ---------------------ID/EVID.
EXH. C- Billing Statements- - - - - - - - - - -ID/EVID
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: GLENN CAROLLO as follows:
Damages/Principal $21,189.01
Atty's fee- $2,450.00
Cost- $345.00
Interest $3,311.80 for a total judgment of $27,295.81.

Judgment signed in open court.

Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2006 Set For Trial On Jan-29-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Dismissal
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK'S Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Dismissal.
RULING: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. (301/PJB/) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-31-2006 Dismissal - No Appearance
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up on Cross-Complaint.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
No appearance by the Plaintiff/Crosss Defendant: Discover Bank.
Defendant/Cross Complainant: Glenn Carollo, present in pro per.
Off the record and after meeting with Mr. Carollo in chambers, matter is Dismissed without prejudice as to the Cross-Complaint-Failed to attached the cause of action in the Cross-Complaint.
Complaint was dismissed by the PJ, for non-appearance of the Plaintiff.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-27-2006 Set For Trial On Jul-31-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
